toolchain.version: Vitis HLS 2025.2 (Linux, free pre-2026.1) — same verified setup as the rest of the suite (see GATE0.md).
toolchain.license_note: Since 2026.1 the free Basic tier is Windows-only; pre-2026.1 (<=2025.2) is free on Linux. xc7z020 is free-tier covered.

target.board: PYNQ-Z2 (dev target; the 2024 report swept Artix/Kintex/Virtex — family sweep is a follow-up experiment, see README.md)
